title: task
description: rust/lichen-node/src/routing.rs:85 - Eviction uses raw timestamp comparison (*t) which fails after u32 wraparound (~49 days). Entry A at last_seen_ms=0xFFFFFF00 (old) vs Entry B at 0x00000100 (recent post-wrap): B gets evicted despite being newer. Fix: use now_ms.wrapping_sub(*t) like prune() does at line 111.
close_reason: Fixed: Changed eviction from min_by_key(*t) to max_by_key(now_ms.wrapping_sub(*t)) for wraparound-safe comparison. Added test for u32 timestamp wraparound scenario.
